mbean.name: jboss:type=Service,name=ConcsvProperties
mbean.attribute:
es.caib.concsv.old.savekeeping.endpoint=http://spreesplin3.caib.es:48080/signatura/services/ConsultaAnonimaDocumentos es.caib.concsv.new.digital.archive.endpoint=https://afirmades.caib.es:4430/esb es.caib.concsv.new.digital.archive.app.client=TEST es.caib.concsv.new.digital.archive.username=app1 es.caib.concsv.new.digital.archive.password=app1 es.caib.concsv.new.digital.archive.organization=CAIB es.caib.concsv.new.digital.archive.version=1.0 es.caib.concsv.performance=S es.caib.concsv.query.url=http://vd.caib.es
es.caib.concsv.consult.oldSafeKeeping=S es.caib.concsv.consult.newDigitalArchive=S
es.caib.concsv.do.tiny=S es.caib.concsv.tiny.username=u91310 es.caib.concsv.tiny.password=u91310 es.caib.concsv.tiny.rest.url=http://epreinf23.caib.es:8080/tinycaib/ws/rest es.caib.concsv.show.captcha=S
